root_text.sn26.5:1.2: “Yo kho, bhikkhave, cakkhusamphassajāya vedanāya uppādo ṭhiti …pe… jarāmaraṇassa pātubhāvo …pe….
root_text.sn26.5:2.3: Yo ca kho, bhikkhave, cakkhusamphassajāya vedanāya nirodho vūpasamo …pe…
root_text.sn26.5:2.5: yo manosamphassajāya vedanāya nirodho vūpasamo atthaṅgamo, dukkhasseso nirodho, rogānaṁ vūpasamo, jarāmaraṇassa atthaṅgamo”ti.

translation_text.sn26.5:1.2: “Mendicants, the arising of feeling born of eye contact …
translation_text.sn26.5:2.1: the arising of feeling born of mind contact …
translation_text.sn26.5:2.2: is the manifestation of old age and death.
translation_text.sn26.5:2.3: The cessation of feeling born of eye contact …
translation_text.sn26.5:2.5: the cessation of feeling born of mind contact … is the disappearance of old age and death.”
